Feature requests, feedback on existing functionality, and ideas for making Cursor better.") - [All categories](https://forum.cursor.com/categories) Tags - [chat](https://forum.cursor.com/tag/chat/272 "") - [cli](https://forum.cursor.com/tag/cli/313 "") - [performance](https://forum.cursor.com/tag/performance/300 "") - [crashes](https://forum.cursor.com/tag/crashes/301 "") - [terminal](https://forum.cursor.com/tag/terminal/273 "") - [All tags](https://forum.cursor.com/tags) ​ # [Feature Request: Allow Manual or Programmatic Setting of Chat Tab Titles](https://forum.cursor.com/t/feature-request-allow-manual-or-programmatic-setting-of-chat-tab-titles/111853) [Ideas](https://forum.cursor.com/c/ideas/22) [Feature Requests](https://forum.cursor.com/c/ideas/feature-requests/5) ​ 9 You have selected **0** posts. [select all](https://forum.cursor.com/t/feature-request-allow-manual-or-programmatic-setting-of-chat-tab-titles/111853) [cancel selecting](https://forum.cursor.com/t/feature-request-allow-manual-or-programmatic-setting-of-chat-tab-titles/111853) 152 views 7 users [![](https://sea3.discourse-cdn.com/cursor1/user_avatar/forum.cursor.com/pwrsrg/48/96320_2.png)](https://forum.cursor.com/u/PwrSrg "PwrSrg") [![](https://avatars.discourse-cdn.com/v4/letter/t/8491ac/48.png)](https://forum.cursor.com/u/Tazz "Tazz") [![](https://sea3.discourse-cdn.com/cursor1/user_avatar/forum.cursor.com/condor/48/73148_2.png)](https://forum.cursor.com/u/condor "condor") [![](https://sea3.discourse-cdn.com/cursor1/user_avatar/forum.cursor.com/izento/48/81816_2.png)](https://forum.cursor.com/u/Izento "Izento") [![](https://avatars.discourse-cdn.com/v4/letter/e/c89c15/48.png)](https://forum.cursor.com/u/Eric_Lee "Eric_Lee") [Jul 2025](https://forum.cursor.com/t/feature-request-allow-manual-or-programmatic-setting-of-chat-tab-titles/111853/1 "Jump to the first post") 1 / 7 Jul 2025 [Mar 4](https://forum.cursor.com/t/feature-request-allow-manual-or-programmatic-setting-of-chat-tab-titles/111853/7) ## post by Mark\_Cline on Jul 1, 2025 [![](https://avatars.discourse-cdn.com/v4/letter/m/c68b51/48.png)](https://forum.cursor.com/u/mark_cline) [Mark Cline](https://forum.cursor.com/u/mark_cline) [Jul 2025](https://forum.cursor.com/t/feature-request-allow-manual-or-programmatic-setting-of-chat-tab-titles/111853 "Post date") Hi Cursor Team, I’d love the ability to manually set or override the chat tab title in Cursor AI chats. Currently, the tab title is auto-generated from the first message, but for my workflow, it would be extremely helpful to: - Set a custom title for each chat (e.g., “Session: Feature f-00008 - Playlist Sharing”) - Update the title as the session evolves - Optionally, allow the AI or a rule/memory to set the title programmatically Why this matters: - Makes it easier to organize and find specific sessions - Improves context switching between multiple chats - Supports more structured workflows and documentation Possible implementations: - Right-click tab > “Rename” - Command palette action: “Set Chat Tab Title” - API or config for advanced users Thank you for considering this! Cursor is awesome and this would make it even better for power users. ### Solved ​ [​](https://forum.cursor.com/t/feature-request-allow-manual-or-programmatic-setting-of-chat-tab-titles/111853/3 "go to the quoted post") > ![](https://sea3.discourse-cdn.com/cursor1/user_avatar/forum.cursor.com/deanrie/48/1263_2.png)[Change the Chat Name](https://forum.cursor.com/t/change-the-chat-name/106246/2) [Feature Requests](https://forum.cursor.com/c/feature-requests/5) > > > Hey, you can actually do this by opening the chat history window. > > [\[image\]](https://us1.discourse-cdn.com/cursor1/original/3X/3/4/34f01f6c5a697a158efa6ae4a4f3650250659cbb.png "image") [![](https://sea3.discourse-cdn.com/cursor1/user_avatar/forum.cursor.com/deanrie/24/1263_2.png)](https://forum.cursor.com/u/deanrie) by Dean Rie in [post 3](https://forum.cursor.com/t/feature-request-allow-manual-or-programmatic-setting-of-chat-tab-titles/111853/3) accepted by Mark Cline 1 ​ ​ - [Change the Chat Name](https://forum.cursor.com/t/change-the-chat-name/106246/5) 152 views 7 users [![](https://sea3.discourse-cdn.com/cursor1/user_avatar/forum.cursor.com/pwrsrg/48/96320_2.png)](https://forum.cursor.com/u/PwrSrg "PwrSrg") [![](https://avatars.discourse-cdn.com/v4/letter/t/8491ac/48.png)](https://forum.cursor.com/u/Tazz "Tazz") [![](https://sea3.discourse-cdn.com/cursor1/user_avatar/forum.cursor.com/condor/48/73148_2.png)](https://forum.cursor.com/u/condor "condor") [![](https://sea3.discourse-cdn.com/cursor1/user_avatar/forum.cursor.com/izento/48/81816_2.png)](https://forum.cursor.com/u/Izento "Izento") [![](https://avatars.discourse-cdn.com/v4/letter/e/c89c15/48.png)](https://forum.cursor.com/u/Eric_Lee "Eric_Lee") ## post by condor on Jul 1, 2025 ## post by deanrie on Jul 2, 2025 3 months later ## post by Izento on Oct 2, 2025 2 months later ## post by Tazz on Dec 3, 2025 2 months later ## post by PwrSrg on Jan 28 1 month later ## post by Eric\_Lee on Mar 4 Reply ### Related topics | Topic | | Replies | Views | Activity | | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | | [Expose programmatic chat renaming for agents](https://forum.cursor.com/t/expose-programmatic-chat-renaming-for-agents/154152)
